title: lithocarpus levis
intro: Lithocarpus levis, also known as smooth corkbark, is a plant species in the beech family (Fagaceae) that is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The smooth corkbark has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Lithocarpus levis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and provide benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function.
